reviewer.displayName: Ricardo C. Larrondo CC RNFS División Kilo

reviews.comment:
El café me encantó, aunque estaba bastante fuerte. Las medialunas regulares, no estaban duras pero si frías.
No sé por qué razón algunas personas tenían shot de soda/agua y a mi no me dieron (desconozco si había que pedir, raro si fuera así).
Precio algo elevado para lo que ofrecen.

(Translated by Google)
I loved the coffee, although it was quite strong. The croissants were just okay; they weren't hard, but they were cold.
I don't know why some people got shots of soda/water and I didn't (I don't know if you had to ask for them, which would be strange). The price is a bit high for what they offer.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKNnEyNzRRRRAB
